testCases.title: Successful user registration with valid data
testCases.preconditions: User is not registered; email server is accessible
testCases.expectedResult: System displays success message; verification email is sent; user account is created in unverified state

testCases.title: Registration fails with duplicate email
testCases.preconditions: Test email already registered in system
testCases.expectedResult: System displays error '该邮箱已被使用'; account is not created

testCases.title: Registration validation for invalid username formats
testCases.expectedResult: Real-time validation shows appropriate error messages for each invalid format

testCases.title: Email verification link activation
testCases.preconditions: User registered but not verified; has verification email
testCases.expectedResult: Account status changes to verified; user can log in; appropriate confirmation is displayed

testCases.title: Successful password-based login with 'Remember me'
testCases.preconditions: User has verified account; browser cookies cleared
testCases.expectedResult: User is logged in; session persists for 7 days; appropriate welcome message displayed

testCases.title: Account lockout after 5 failed login attempts
testCases.preconditions: User has verified account; no recent failed attempts
steps: Attempt login with correct password on 6th attempt
testCases.expectedResult: After 5th failed attempt, account is locked; 6th attempt shows lockout message; account unlocks after 15 minutes

testCases.title: First-time OAuth login with GitHub
testCases.preconditions: User has GitHub account; not previously linked
testCases.expectedResult: New account is automatically created; user is logged in; account is linked to GitHub

testCases.title: Password reset request and completion
testCases.preconditions: User has verified account; email server accessible
steps: Enter new valid password and confirmation
testCases.expectedResult: Reset email sent; link works once; password is updated; user is logged out of all devices

testCases.title: Password reset link expiration after 30 minutes
testCases.preconditions: User requested password reset; has reset email
steps: Wait 31 minutes after reset email sent
testCases.expectedResult: System displays link expired message; user must request new reset link

testCases.title: Login response time performance test
testCases.preconditions: User has verified account; system under normal load
testCases.expectedResult: Login completes within 500ms; user is redirected to dashboard

testCases.title: Cross-browser compatibility for registration
testCases.preconditions: Test on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge
steps: Open registration page in each browser
Complete registration form with valid data
testCases.expectedResult: Registration works correctly in all supported browsers; layout is consistent

testCases.title: Mobile responsive design for login
steps: Open login page on mobile device
testCases.expectedResult: Login interface is responsive; all elements accessible; functionality works correctly

testCases.title: Concurrent login sessions after password change
testCases.preconditions: User logged in on Device A and Device B
steps: On Device A, change password via settings
On Device B, attempt to access protected resource
On Device B, attempt to log in with old password
On Device B, attempt to log in with new password
testCases.expectedResult: Device B session is terminated; old password fails; new password succeeds

testCases.title: OAuth login with existing email conflict
testCases.preconditions: User has regular account with email; attempts OAuth login with same email
steps: Ensure regular account exists with test@example.com
Click 'Login with Google' using Google account with same email
testCases.expectedResult: System handles conflict appropriately (either merges accounts or prompts user)

coverageAnalysis: Test coverage includes: 1) All registration validation scenarios (success, duplicate email, format errors), 2) Email verification flow, 3) Password-based login (success, failure, lockout, remember me), 4) OAuth login (first-time, returning), 5) Password reset (request, link usage, expiration), 6) Security requirements (password encryption, session management), 7) Performance (response time), 8) Compatibility (cross-browser, mobile). Missing: Load/stress testing, detailed security penetration testing, accessibility compliance testing, and localization/internationalization if required.
thoughtProcess: 1. Identify user roles: Unregistered user, Registered user (unverified), Registered user (verified), User with OAuth account, User locked out due to failed attempts, User requesting password reset.
2. Break down functions: User registration (form validation, email verification), User login (password-based, OAuth, remember me, lockout), Password reset (request, link usage, password change).
3. Analyze exceptions: Duplicate email/username, invalid input formats, expired verification/reset links, OAuth failures, account lockout, concurrent sessions, browser compatibility issues.
